EARL DISSELHORST WITH PET. ROGER MEREDITH WITH RESP. WITNESSES SWORN AND TESTIFIED AND EXHIBITS MARKED FOR IDENTIFICATION AND/OR MOVED INTO EVIDENCE AS PER WITNESS AND EXHIBIT LISTS. AFTER ARGUMENT AND SUBMISSION, COURT ORDERS THAT PETITIONER'S REQUEST FOR A DV R/O IS DENIED. THERE IS NO GOOD FAITH BASIS FOR THE ISSUANCE OF A R/O. TRO ISSUED JUNE 11, 2002 IS TERMINATED AS OF TODAY'S DATE. ALL EXHIBITS WERE RETURNED TO RESPECTIVE COUNSEL. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797.
